html:
2026-0564
2026-06-09PMOParliament of Canada ActOrder appointing a Parliamentary SecretaryOrder terminating the appointment of David Myles as Parliamentary Secretary to the Minister of the Environment made by Order in Council P.C. 2026-0523 of May 29, 2026; and appointing David Myles, a member of the House of Commons, to be Parliamentary Secretary to the Minister of Canadian Heritage and Parliamentary Secretary to the Minister of the Environment, to be styled Parliamentary Secretary to the Minister of Canadian Identity and Culture and Minister responsible for Official Languages and Parliamentary Secretary to the Secretary of State (Nature), for a period ending on May 29, 2027.N/A
subject: Order appointing a Parliamentary Secretary
precis: Order terminating the appointment of David Myles as Parliamentary Secretary to the Minister of the Environment made by Order in Council P.C. 2026-0523 of May 29, 2026; and appointing David Myles, a member of the House of Commons, to be Parliamentary Secretary to the Minister of Canadian Heritage and Parliamentary Secretary to the Minister of the Environment, to be styled Parliamentary Secretary to the Minister of Canadian Identity and Culture and Minister responsible for Official Languages and Parliamentary Secretary to the Secretary of State (Nature), for a period ending on May 29, 2027.
